entry.title: Different Insurance Plan Per Dependent
entry.content:
I have a requirement where Health Insurance can be enrolled for the employee's dependent. The insurance plan varies in terms of dependent relationship, coverage, and premium amount.

Example of Insurance Plans:

  • Spouse and Child - Coverage 100k - Premium $100
  • Parents - Coverage 80k - Premium $75

Using the example above, the employee can manually enroll their spouse, child, and both parents. In the enrollment screen, employee can only select 1 insurance plan and it applies to all 3 dependent relationship but it should not be the case since Spouse and Child is under a different plan vs the Parent.

Any leads to any solution is appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Create records in a user table using the Service Laye...
entry.content:
@ANKIT_CHAUHAN 

Thank you, it solved my problem.

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content:
Thanks @corriveau and @sikindar... Appreciate your responses. I understand the logic that is executed..

What exactly is

ADDNA *?

FILLF N?

WGTYP=*

why has SAP used these operations? I tried to read the documentation, but I felt it to be slightly confusing. It would be great if you could help me with this.

I tried to use PRINT operations to understand, but it is even more confusing when I see the results. Pls see attached screenshot.

Thanks!

The process I followed was I raised a support ticket to SAP sharing my certificate details which is available in the learning history. The dates were extended immediately.

entry.title: Re: When testing PunchOut Catalogue, items are not being Added to Cart?
entry.content: Hi SiruiLiu. The Cart page is actually in both? It is a stand alone WooCommerce built site that has been made PunchOut ready. The Non-ability to Add to Cart only occurs when the site is loaded within the ERP (Sap Ariba)? Thanks for the comment and interest.

entry.title: Re: TestSuite Analytics: Download to excel
entry.content:
I tested the following reports in SAP internal standard systems (solman 7.2 SP15, SP19 and SP20).

  • Test Plan – Test Packages Analysis: Test Note ja Test result icons is missing
  • Test Plan – Test Cases Analysis: Test Note, Test result ja Overall status icons is missing

and got the following results:

It works for solman 7.2 SP15 and SP20, the icons can be displayed in the download excel file.

The issue only occurs on solman 7.2 SP19. It should be a bug for solman 7.2 SP19. The focused build developer needs to be involved to fix the bug. Please raise an incident under the component SV-SMG-OST-FB-TWB with the issue details. (It will be better to provide a sample with some screenshots.)

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content: ADDNA it adds the number which is in input table , FILLF N fill the number from the input

entry.title: SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition now available by Deployment Journey
entry.content:
Effective March 10, 2025, we are introducing a change to the way you access SAP Activate roadmaps for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition in the SAP Activate road map viewer. 

Previously, the New Implementation, System Conversion, and Selective Data Transition journeys were available under a single roadmap, with filtering options to refine your view by scenario. To provide a clearer, more structured approach, we are now offering three distinct roadmaps, each dedicated to its respective deployment journey while still following the SAP Activate methodology framework. 

What's Changing? 

🔹Before: A single implementation roadmap with filters/tags for different transition paths.

🔹After: Three standalone implementation roadmaps, each tailored for a specific deployment journey: 

✔️SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - New Implementation

✔️SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - System Conversion

✔️SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Selective Data Transition

How Does this Benefit You?

  • More clarity when navigating your RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition deployment journey
  • Content streamlined and structured for each scenario
  • Easier access and management: simply save the link/roadmaps as favorite

Action Required

Starting March 10, 2025, please update your saved roadmaps and add them to your favorites list. 

🙂We Value Your Feedback! 

We want to ensure these changes enhance your experience. Let us know your thoughts! Do you find this new structure helpful? Are there any improvements you'd like to see in the future? Share your feedback with us by using the feedback functionality in SAP Activate road map viewer. 

Thank you for your continued engagement with SAP Activate!

entry.title: UI for SAP Build Apps / Apps Editor looks different

entry.title: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crystal Reports Viewer
entry.content:
Please tell us how to print only one specified page from a multi-page document
using Crystal Report Viewer in a Windows 11.
Printing is done by selecting the [Print] button in Crystal Report Viewer.
To print, use the Windows print dialog to specify the pages.
We want to print the page we want to print without previewing it in Crystal Report Viewer,
but even if we specify a page, the previewed page gets printed.
We can print multiple pages as specified, but we cannot print just one page.

Our development environment is as follows.

Windows 11 Pro(23H2)
Microsoft Visual Studio 2022(64bit)Version 17.13.0
Microsoft .NET Framework 4.8
SAP Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 Patch100(64bit)
SAP Crystal Reports, version for Microsoft Visual Studio(SP37)(64bit)
SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio(SP37) CR_runtime(64bit)
SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio(SP37) Merge Modules(64bit)

In addition, in a Windows 10, we could print just one page.

entry.title: Get Data from https://smard.api.bund.dev/ not working (complete ABAP-Code is in post)
entry.content:
Good morning,

I have to code some ABAP to receive data from https://smard.api.bund.dev/

For my first attemped I used the URL "https://smard.api.proxy.bund.dev/app/chart_data/1223/DE/index_hour.json"

When I use this URL in the browser I see/get

 

 

I created a SM59 connection:

 

 

My code is:

 

  DATA: lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_http_client,
        lv_url         TYPE        string.


  cl_http_client=>create_by_destination(
      EXPORTING
          destination = 'BUNDESNETZAGENTURSTROMMARKTDATEN'
      IMPORTING
          client = lo_http_client " HTTP Client object
      EXCEPTIONS
           argument_not_found = 1
           destination_not_found = 2
           destination_no_authority = 3
           plugin_not_active = 4
           internal_error = 5
           OTHERS = 6 ).

  lo_http_client->request->set_method( if_http_request=>co_request_method_post ).
  lo_http_client->request->set_version( if_http_request=>co_protocol_version_1_1 ).
  lv_url =
  '/app/chart_data/1223/DE/index_hour.json'.

  CALL METHOD cl_http_utility=>set_request_uri
    EXPORTING
      request = lo_http_client->request
      uri     = lv_url.


  lo_http_client->request->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).
  CALL METHOD lo_http_client->send "sending request to api
    EXCEPTIONS
      http_communication_failure = 1
      http_invalid_state         = 2.

  CALL METHOD lo_http_client->receive "receiving response from api
    EXCEPTIONS
      http_communication_failure = 1
      http_invalid_state         = 2
      http_processing_failed     = 3.

  DATA:
*        http_status TYPE string,
        reason      TYPE string,
        response    TYPE string.

  CALL METHOD lo_http_client->response->get_status
    IMPORTING
      code   = data(http_status)
      reason = reason.

  response = lo_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).
*  cl_demo_output=>display_json( json = json_response ).
  cl_demo_output=>display_text( text =  response ).

 

But my ABAP Code displays only:

 

What I am doing wrong

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2

entry.title: APIs to Fetch Business Partner Blocked using ILM in S4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Need assistance with retrieving Business Partner details in S4HANA Public Cloud after it has been blocked using the Blocking of Business Partner Data app under Data Protection and Privacy.

Currently, when a Business Partner is blocked, the OData API (sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner) does not return the corresponding record. However, I can still view the Business Partner details via the Maintain Business Partner app.

Is there a way to access the blocked Business Partner details using an API with communication user or any other way to identify which Business Partners are blocked using API?

The objective is to react to any Blocked Business Partner in a SAP Integrated external application.

Please provide guidance on how to achieve this.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning : Advance Formulas (Aggregation)
entry.content:
Hey all, 

can anyone of you help me need to calculate the product of aggregated account dimensions (Units and Lookup Price) across the Product and Time dimensions. However, when I directly multiply these accounts using Data Actions, the calculation is performed row-wise first and then aggregated, leading to incorrect results. Instead, I want to first aggregate the values by Product and Time and then perform the multiplication to ensure accuracy. Can anyone help me with how to achieve this using scripting? I have to claculate the Revenue NA for NorthEast Region 

please help this is the code that I wrote  just to check th value for units only but no result is appearing 

MEMBERSET [d/ENTITY] = "REG0001"
VARIABLEMEMBER #SUMOFUNITS OF [d/ACCOUNT]
DATA([d/ACCOUNT]=#SUMOFUNITS, [d/PRODUCT]="#") = RESULTLOOKUP ([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0020" )
DATA([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0060" ) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ACCOUNT] = #SUMOFUNITS , [d/PRODUCT]= "#")

alternative workaround but still values are not appearing 

MEMBERSET [d/ENTITY] = "REG0001"
MEMBERSET [d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0020"
AGGREGATE_DIMENSIONS = [d/PRODUCT],[d/ACCOUNT]
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0060"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/PRODUCT] = "#"

Please let me know if any details required.


Thanks,
Tejas

entry.title: The Support Team field the message processor is displayed
entry.content:
Hello!
I need your help again please, I set up a new operation class in ITSM, everything works fine, except that in the Support Team field the message processor is displayed and the message processor field is locked, but it is only for this operation, I use the same view for all operations and for the others it works correctly, I already checked the configuration and the field is not locked.

The operation that starts with 5 is the new one, the one that starts with 9 is the old one and I am using the same view

entry.title: Re: Please help me to understand the integration process...
entry.content:
HI Team,

Material Ledger  is default active in S4 HANA Public cloud and Private cloud. If Actual costing is required or not in Public and Private cloud is depends on customer specific requirements. 

Material ledger acts independently in PUblic and Private cloud  with respect to thier inventory transactions. meaning all inventory transactions in public cloud are mangaed by material ledger in public cloud and all inventory trabsactions of private cloud are managaed by material ledger in private cloud including actual costing.

For Inter company transactions, both private and public cloud will carry its own transactions and interfaces are available to push the data from one system to other for carrying Intercompany transactions. For example, public cloud creates a PO for material purchase, we can auto create SO in Private cloud using 2Tier architecture  interface. Material Ledger independenlty records the transactions in respective systems on Public cloud (example - PO, GR & IR) and Private cloud (example sales, deliver and billing)

Transfer pricing margin of an intercompay transaction can be acheived by putting a necessary condition type in PO and SO. There is no link of material ledger with transfer pricing in 2 -Tier architecture.

Regards

Venu

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi thankyou for your answer. I looked at object R3TR CLAS /UI2/CL_JSON in transaction SE03 in both systems and it is the same. There is no log for the transports. I looked at transaction SAINT (goto=>import history => OCS package) – it is the same in both systems. Do I have to look at another section of SAINT? My aim is that in QA the version of /UI2/CL_JSON will be the same as in DEV.

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi  I write an answer in addition to comment because I cannot paste print screen to a comment.

Thank you for your answer. I looked at object R3TR CLAS /UI2/CL_JSON in transaction SE03 in both systems and it is the same. There is no log for the transports.

I looked at transaction SAINT  (goto=>import history => OCS package) – it is the same in both systems.

Do I have to look at another section of SAINT?

My aim is that in QA the version of  /UI2/CL_JSON will be the same as in DEV.

Thankyou Hagit

entry.title: Unified Responsibility Management is not activated for Flexible workflow
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Need you assistance on how to enable / activate the Unified Responsibility Management for Flexible Workflow.

Issue Description: BADI RSM_BADI_CONTEXT_ATTRIB_CALC is not getting called in Flexible workflow for SES in S/4HANA Public cloud

Details: The flexible workflow has been setup and activated for the SES/PR/PO/Contracts. For determining the agents, a Team has been setup using the Teams and Responsibilities app. The Team has a hierarchical setup with direct sub teams and team members. Additional custom responsibility definitions have been created and assigned to the team category PROC.

When the SES/Purchase Order/Contract is created, the expected approver determination is not correct. Custom responsibility definitions are not being considered. BADI RSM_BADI_CONTEXT_ATTRIB_CALC has been implemented but is not getting called.

The same BADI has also been implemented for Flexible workflow for Purchase requisitions and is getting called.

Code Debugging:

Based on the analysis, as an example, the SES workflow definition doesn’t have the unified Responsibility management property activated. This causes the SES workflow not to call the BADI RSM_BADI_CONTEXT_ATTRIB_CALC even though there is an implementation for this in S/4HANA Public cloud.

 

However, for the Purchase requisition, the unified Responsibility management is activated. This means that the BADI is getting called.

 

Any help would be appreciated.


Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi I cannot paste print screen into a comment, so I pasted it into an answer

Sumit

entry.title: CCM - WB2R_SC - Partial Settlement
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am using standard configuration for condition contract settlement process.

Delta accrual - Posting Status - Green ticked - Accounting document generated but Tax code not showing in accounting document why?

Partial settlement - Posting Status - Blocked for accounting - Why standard setting like this? I have Spro checked Configuration also.

Posting block for Transfer to Accounting - Unchecked

Same settings for delta accrual settlement type, but its working fine with account posting

Final Settlement - getting error WB2R130 - Settlement document for xx.xx.xxxx (date) are still changeable

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content: @FabioPagoti , thank you for your answer. The results for E071 are the same in both systems. The transport does not have a log.

entry.title: Re: Preview the remote file content from the integrated SAP system
entry.content: I searched with all possible option I could explore and unable to find the solution. This is important that we don't allow direct download understanding the privacy concern of the attachment information.

entry.title: Re: SAP C4C - Calendar questions
entry.content:
Hi Pedro,

Unfortunately, there is no option to limit the number of simultaneous appointments in the calendar. However, what you can do is the following: Using SAP Cloud Applications Studio or SAP Fiori, you could potentially develop a custom solution or add a validation rule that checks if there are more than five appointments scheduled in a given time slot. This would require a developer to create custom code that interacts with the calendar's appointment booking functionality.

With regards to your second approach, the shared user account would allow multiple appointments to be scheduled under one user, which could also help manage room bookings, as the calendar for this user would show all the appointments at once. But, by using a shared user, the system won’t inherently limit the number of appointments. This would still rely on a custom solution as mentioned.

I hope it helps!

entry.title: Re: Delete Document via API on Document Information Extra...
entry.content:
Dear ThoreB,

the reason, why documents are being deleted in the Document Extraction Service after some time is because of the (configurable) retention time. See also the help documentation here. In other words, the Document Extraction Service can not be used as a permanent storage of information, but will only allow to store documents and extraction results for a limited time before they are deleted automatically (based on the retention period). So, you can configure the service to store documents up to 30 days maximum, after which the data is deleted. 

Please note, that we are considering to introduce the possibility in the future to keep data even for longer periods of time. 

Hope this helps.

Document Information Extraction team

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Mobile App login issues
entry.content: I created a ticket to SAP and it was some issue with the mobile app. It have resolved after the update of the new version of the app.

entry.title: Re: CRM Copy Badi Service contract to Order
entry.content: Please use BAdI BAdI_CRM_COPY_CONTROL in SE18. Hope it helps!

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Open a form as View Mode
entry.content: Yes. The web client is supported by both SQL & HANA database servers

entry.title: Re: Media content field value disappeared after draftActivate
entry.content: Checked the value in SAP HANA Cloud, I find that the field "fileContent" has value but "fileName", "mediaType" remain empty when transporting this entry from draft table to normal table

entry.title: Re: EKPO showing different ADRNR for single PO, due to wh...
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Table Input Format for Anomaly Detection in HANA_ML
entry.content: It is a documentation error and will soon be fixed.

entry.title: Re: SAP CDC Dataflow - Lookup Component Handling Multiple...
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari,
Based on your comment below, the solution is the following:
In component file.parse.dsv, you need to uncheck the inferTypes parameter (set to false).

Because while it is set to true, the CDC will attempt to parse string values into Boolean, any Number type, and so on. If you don't need it, please uncheck this.
You can find the description of that parameter here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CUSTOMER_DATA_CLOUD/8b8d6fffe113457094a17701f63e3d6a/414ce1d070b21014bbc5a10ce4041860.html#file-parse-dsv

Hope it will resolve your lookup issue.
If not, you can provide an example of your .csv file and the custom field you keep in CDC for lookup, and I will provide another solution.

Regards,
Oleh.

entry.title: AI-Powered Game Changer: Revolutionizing Access to Knowledge
entry.content:
How do you turn hours of searching for enterprise-wide content, scattered in multiple locations, into finding it instantly, saving time, and adding customer value?

To illustrate, if you have 100 pieces of content (aka “digital assets”) that relates to a particular product, technology, solutions, industry or service, you must carefully determine which of these assets are the most current, most accurate, and most relevant before putting it to use.  

How long will it take to find the information you need to get your job done?

For example, when the answer to your search is in multiple locations such as page 127 of a white paper, and/or slide 14 of a conference keynote presentation, and/or the 12th minute of a training video or transcript, it can be painstaking to pinpoint and assimilate the information quickly.

Unfortunately, gen AI tools like OpenAI's ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, and Google Gemini are not equipped to figure out the right answer within an enterprise based on a simple fact:

Today’s gen AI cannot read what is in the files without data connectors which require a huge investment to build, maintain, and put in place so that users can find specific information in a .PPT, .pdf, MS Word, videos, audio, and related files which can change and must be up to date in the cloud.

Organizations face a critical challenge with disparate knowledge scattered across platforms like SharePoint, Slack, Jira, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Microsoft 365, Portals, Dropbox, and Google Drive.

Information becomes hidden, inaccessible, leading to inefficiencies, missed opportunities, and frustrated employees. Traditional solutions, such as static knowledge bases, inadequate search capabilities, and unmaintained resource hubs only aggravate the problem.

Thankfully, the SAP community has an AI-powered, game changing, vetted software solution for business processes and change management that revolutionizes access to knowledge.   

The Knowledge Management Crisis

One way to create immediate value is to deploy a way for workers to have access to an AI-Powered Enterprise Answer Engine® to find the right information at the right time, and as a result, free them up to support customers quicker, more effectively, and more accurately.

However, this objective is easier said than done due to the following:

  1. Knowledge Loss: As retirements, downsizing, layoffs and reorganizations surge and disruption continue, organizations will suffer from a loss of expertise. 
  2. Oceans of Assets: Hybrid and remote workers are challenged with a rising volume of digital content, the demand for efficient KM systems is very high.     
  3. Disparate Tools: The more platforms, apps, and tools an organization uses, the more fragmented their assets and content becomes, leading to organizational chaos which forces employees to spend valuable time searching for information instead of acting on it. 

Each line of business or group such as sales, marketing, human resources, IT, operations, customer support, supply chain management, product management, business networks, suppliers, trading partners, finance, environmental regulations and compliance, mergers and acquisitions, project managers, strategic planners, customer success managers, and/or subject matter expertise rely on quality information that intersects with two common areas:

  1. Business Processes - Interconnected activities or tasks that an organization performs with people, technology, and resources to produce specific goals or outcomes which require KM.
  2. Change Management - Planning, implementing, and monitoring changes within an organization to ensure successful adoption and minimize disruptions. Guiding and supporting individuals, teams, and the organization through transitions to achieve desired outcomes need KM.

From strategy to execution, unlocking faster time to knowledge insight is critical.

Calculating Key KM ROI Metrics

No single metric can fully represent the value of an AI-powered knowledge management system. Organizations should take the time to create a comprehensive measurement approach including:

  • Efficiency Metrics – Time saved searching, reduce information retrieval time
  • Financial Metrics – Cost savings, operational efficiencies  
  • Revenue Performance – Better sales cycles to close more deals. Deliver presentations, more accurate proposals (RFP/RFI), and access to customer success insights.
  • Marketing & Communications Effectiveness – Event content, campaign messaging, thought leadership, go-to-market initiatives, demand gen content in multiple locations
  • Customer Service & Support – Faster helpdesk time to answer questions and resolve issues
  • Environmental Regulations – Access to digital assets that relate to Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD), EU Taxonomy, Omnibus, and others
  • Engagement metrics – User adoption, employee satisfaction, millennial perspective, knowledge contributions, and inspiring innovation
  • Effectiveness Metrics – Employee productivity, onboarding effectiveness, reduced training costs, reskilling and upskilling, and faster decision-making 

An impressive, unique AI-Powered Answer Engine®

As a subject matter expert, writer, content contributor, Amazon book author, low-code/no-code architect, and global business leader, I'm frequently looking in many places for information.

Frustrated at how long it takes for my team and I to find disparate internal, enterprise company information as well serving it up to colleagues around the world who can benefit from it, I sought to find a product and solution that could solve this time-consuming problem.

The Capacity AI-Power Enterprise Answer Engine® (previously known as Lucy AI) provides federated search with automated indexing. The solution, which is part of the SAP Store and Microsoft Azure Marketplace connects to many enterprise applications to help maximize technology investments.

This answer engine ranks and prioritizes results, maintains role and attribute-based controls, and enterprise level security with end-to-end encryption and includes:

  • Instant answer retrieval in seconds
  • One convenient, connected platform
  • Commitment to data security, encryption, and single sign-on protection
  • Large Language Model (LLM) ensures multi-language precise speech recognition
  • Seamless integrations with 85+ existing tools including SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Sales Cloud, SAP Services Cloud, and SAP HANA

The focus is on content and related digitals assets versus going into apps and pulling out data or emulating dashboards. It is a true KM resource which complements enterprise application deployments.   

As a result, teams spend less time looking for answers and more time driving priorities forward.

Suggested Next Steps  

Aligning the strategy and business drivers for moving gen AI-Power Enterprise Answer Engine from experimentation to production is the foundation for success.   

Consider avoiding doing technology for the sake of the technology and ensure a connection with your organization’s compelling business priorities. Business leaders need to be methodical about aligning the solution to business objectives, process, and change management initiatives.  

Knowledge Management is no longer just about storing information.

The key is to ensure that businesses can optimize, locate, and retain institutional knowledge and make it actionable, intelligent, and accessible.

-----
A few SAP Community questions...

  1. How do you use Knowledge Management (KM) (e.g., research, subject matter expertise, client presentations, thought leadership, messaging, etc.)?
  2. How long does it take to find information in disparate locations in your organization (e.g., 30 minutes, 1 hour, 2 hours, greater than 3 hours?) 
  3. What are your experiences with KM? Any fun stories, best practices or lessons learned?

Thanks for your comments! Each one will receive a reply! Also, happy if you click on "Like" ("Thumbs up" next to the kudos above)!

-----
About the Author

Rich Blumberg is a long time SAP Community member and contributor. For 20+ years he's been an SAP consultant working with SAP ecosystem organizations around the globe. He's the President of World Sales Solutions, LLC, (WSS) a business development and low-code no-code services company. In his spare time, he is a Drexel University Alumni Board of Governors Emeritus volunteer, ENGin English tutor for Ukrainian citizens, and an aspiring guitar player.

entry.title: Re: Media content field value disappeared after draftActi...
entry.content:
Solved. This is because i set readonly annotation for field "fileName" and "mediaType".😂

// annotate ChatService.Files with {
//     mediaType @Common.FieldControl: #ReadOnly;
//     fileName @Common.FieldControl: #ReadOnly;
// };

entry.title: Script for PPT upload in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi together,

can somebody provide the Script for importing PPT as template to be edited for SEN?

 

Best regards

Romina
